nasb.text: For your servant vowed a vow while I was living at Geshur in Aram, saying, ‘If the Lord shall indeed bring me back to Jerusalem, then I will serve the Lord.’ ”

esv.text: For your servant vowed a vow while I lived at Geshur in Aram, saying, ‘If the Lord will indeed bring me back to Jerusalem, then I will offer worship to the Lord.’”

cnv.text: 因為僕人住在亞蘭的基述的時候，曾經許了一個願說：‘如果耶和華使我再回到耶路撒冷來，我就要在希伯崙事奉他。’”

ccb.text: 仆人住在亚兰的基述时曾许愿，如果耶和华带领我回到耶路撒冷，我必在希伯仑敬拜祂。”
